Container.Name: valheim
Container.Overview:
Valheim Dedicated Server running under Proton.
**Data layout (all under /data):** - /data/server/ — game server files - /data/saves/ — world saves - /data/logs/ — server.log - /data/backups/ — automated daily backups
**Ports:** 2456/udp (game), 2457/udp (query)
**First Run:** Container downloads game files on first start.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores server files (/server), saves (/saves), logs (/logs), and backups (/backups).

Config.Name: Server Name
Config.Description: Display name shown in the server browser.

Config.Name: Server Password
Config.Description: Server password (minimum 5 characters, or leave empty — note: empty allows anyone to join).

Config.Name: World Name
Config.Description: Name of the world file to load/create.

Config.Name: Game Port
Config.Description: Primary game port (must match port mapping below).

Config.Name: Query Port
Config.Description: Steam query port — must be GAME_PORT+1.

Config.Name: Validate Files
Config.Description: Re-validate game files on each start (true/false).

Config.Name: Game Config
Config.Description: Game preset selector. Do not change.

Config.Name: Steam App ID
Config.Description: Valheim Dedicated Server App ID. Do not change.
